_comment: Canonical viewer@0.1 policy -- the SINGLE source the Python, R, and JS surfaces must match. Each surface keeps its own copy for runtime independence; conformance/policy_linter.py asserts all three equal this file. Edit here first, then update every surface + re-run the linter.

compression._comment: Per-field viewer layout (pagoda3-measured on pbmc3k). The prep tags each field's write opts: gene-major raw-counts basis -> raw single-chunk (hero gene-color = exact-byte reads) unless compress_primary; counts_cellmajor -> zstd chunked+sharded (chunk-granular subset reads via per-chunk decompress); every other array -> zstd single-chunk (read whole -> best ratio, no read penalty). chunk_elems=16384 sits in the compression knee.
